title: UltraPickaxe
description: Introducing the latest pickaxes, now with the ability to dig in a 3x3 area and beyond.
body:
# **UltraPickaxe**: Redefining Mining Mastery

Experience the pinnacle of mining prowess with **UltraPickaxe**, a groundbreaking plugin that revolutionizes the way you excavate in Minecraft. Say goodbye to conventional pickaxes and embrace a new era of customization and power.

With UltraPickaxe, the control is firmly in your hands. Customize your pickaxe's **radius** and **depth of excavation** with ease, tailoring it to your specific needs and preferences.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1015526/description_69fd8894-7836-4cd6-b4ec-9f40b5028049.gif)

Whether you're embarking on a solo mining expedition or leading a bustling community project, UltraPickaxe adapts seamlessly to your gameplay style. Its **intuitive configuration system** ensures that every swing of your pickaxe is precisely calibrated to maximize efficiency and yield.

But the true beauty of UltraPickaxe lies in its simplicity. By eschewing complex commands in favor of a **straightforward configuration file**, we've made harnessing its power accessible to players of all skill levels. Dive into the depths of Minecraft with confidence, knowing that **UltraPickaxe** is by your side, ready to elevate your mining experience to new heights.

Experience the future of mining with **UltraPickaxe** – where customization meets convenience, and every swing brings you one step closer to greatness.

---

## **Getting Started**

1. Place the plugin file in the `plugins` folder.
2. Restart the server.
3. Use the command `/ultrapickaxe give [nickname] [pickaxe name]`.

---

## **Commands**

- `/ultrapickaxe give [nickname] [pickaxe name]`  
  _Gives an UltraPickaxe to the specified player._  
  _(Requires permission `ultrapickaxe.admin`)_

---

## **Permissions**

- **`ultrapickaxe.admin`**  
  _Grants access to the `/ultrapickaxe give` command._
